---
title: "Susanna Wordsworth"
---

## Susanna Wordsworth

**Dates:** (13 May 1846-30 Jan 1912)

### Description

sister of Elizabeth Wordsworth

### Biography

Head of the College of Greyladies which did social work in Southwark. [Wordsworth, <i>Glimpses of the Past</i>]

### Letters

- Letter from January 2, 1897
- Letter from Oct 24th 1895

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
